org_full_name: Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Мы создадим все условия: Our main goal is to make Uzbekistan a reliable and long-term partner for foreign investors.
Президент Республики Узбекистан: President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Совет иностранных инвесторов при Президе: The Foreign Investors’ Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan was established in 2019. Its Chair is the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan, and its Co-Chair is the President of the EBRD.
Среди ключевых представителей Совета — т: Among the Council’s key representatives are major international organizations such as the EBRD, IFC, and ADB.
barqaror rivojlanish va iqtisodiy isloho: brings together organizations aimed at supporting sustainable development and economic reforms Republic of Uzbekistan.

blitzInterview.description: A series of short video interviews with the heads of companies — members of the Council. Participants answer four questions: what is their business in Uzbekistan; what is the country's key competitive advantage; their success story; the main challenge for development.

Азиз Гафуров – топ-менеджер с более чем: Doctor of Economic Sciences with over 20 years of experience in corporate governance, investment policy, and strategic consulting. He has extensive experience working with international investors, development banks, and government institutions. He leads the development of investor relations, policy coordination, and institutional development.
Авазбек имеет более чем 15-летний профес: Avazbek Mullajonov is a specialist with more than 15 years of experience in the field of foreign economic relations, investments, and energy. He worked as Deputy Head of the Investment Climate Department and Head of the Cooperation Department with the Republic of Turkey at the Ministry of Investments and Foreign Trade of Uzbekistan. He holds a master's degree in International Business from Ajou University and a degree in Management from Tashkent State University of Economics.
До присоединения к Секретариату СИИ Мади: Madinakhon holds a Bachelor’s degree in Business and Economics and a Master’s degree in Agribusiness and Investment Activities. She has worked as a manager at the Association of Private Tourism Organizations of Uzbekistan, where she coordinated events aimed at the development of national and international tourism.
Журабек Бабаев — маркетолог нового покол: Jurabek Babaev is a specialist with experience in marketing, PR, and international business. He currently heads PR and communications at the Foreign Investors Council under the President of Uzbekistan. Throughout his career, he worked in business development, international trade, and the textile industry, and also worked as a lecturer at the Tashkent State University of Economics.
Хакимнияз Каипбергенов с отличием окончи: Hakimniyaz Kaipbergenov graduated with honors from MGIMO in Moscow with bachelor's and master's degrees in international law. He has experience working at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Uzbekistan as well as at an international law firm.

1. Координационное совещание Рабочей гру: 1. Coordination meeting of the Working Group on Talent Attraction and Human Capital Development

Как меняется налоговая сис тема: How the tax system is changing
Налоговая система сегодня меняется быстр: The tax system today is changing faster than we can get used to the old rules. If everything used to be simple: pay a fixed amount and live peacefully, now governments are increasingly switching to digital tools. Electronic declarations, online cash registers, automatic transaction verification — all this is not fantasy, but reality. Many countries are reducing the number of 'tax loopholes', making the system more transparent for businesses and regulatory authorities. At the same time, benefits are being introduced for startups, IT companies and 'green' projects to stimulate the development of needed industries.
Налоги начинают работать не только как и: Taxes are beginning to work not only as a tool for collecting money, but also as a lever of influence on the economy. However, along with convenience comes strict control — less.
Появляются даже эксперименты с динамичес: There are even experiments with dynamic taxes, where the rate depends on the economic situation. And it seems that in the future paying taxes will become easier... but less space for gray schemes and 'envelopes'. More and more operations are automatically transferred to tax authorities without human participation cheaper.
Так что адаптироваться придётся всем — и: So everyone will have to adapt — both entrepreneurs and ordinary citizens.
Совет иностранных инвесторов при Президе: The Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan is an institutional platform for direct dialogue between the Government of Uzbekistan and investors doing business or investing in Uzbekistan.
Деятельность СИИ направлена на выявление: The activities of the FIC are aimed at identifying and analyzing the main obstacles to attracting investment and investor activities, developing solutions together with government agencies to eliminate these obstacles, ensuring a favorable business environment and investment climate in Uzbekistan. The tasks of the Council are detailed in Appendix No. 1 to the Resolution.
Председателем Совета иностранных инвести: The Chairman of the Foreign Investment Council is the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
Президент ЕБРР является сопредседателем: The President of the EBRD is the Co-Chairman of the Foreign Investment Council.
Пленарное заседание Совета иностранных и: The plenary session of the Foreign Investment Council under the chairmanship of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan and co-chairmanship of the President of the EBRD is held once a year.
Временное заседание Совета иностранных и: The interim session of the Foreign Investment Council under the chairmanship of the Minister of Investment, Industry and Trade of the Republic of Uzbekistan is held at least twice a year.
Казумаса Мукае - генеральный менеджер Co: Kazumasa Mukae - General Manager of Coca-Cola Bottlers Uzbekistan. He has extensive experience in the beverage industry and management of international companies and plays an important role in the development of the company's operational activities in Uzbekistan. Under his leadership, initiatives are being implemented aimed at increasing production efficiency, ensuring product quality in accordance with international standards, and strengthening the brand's position in the local market. Kazumasa Mukae actively contributes to the company's sustainable development, the introduction of modern technologies, and the expansion of social responsibility projects.
Председатель Национального комитета по э: Chairman of the National Committee for Ecology and Climate Change
Азизбек Абдухакимов - председатель Нацио: Azizbek Abduhakimov - Chairman of the National Committee on Ecology and Climate Change. He has many years of experience in public administration, tourism, and ecology. In different years, he worked as Deputy Prime Minister and in responsible positions in the field of tourism development. Under his leadership, systemic reforms are being carried out to protect the environment, ensure environmental sustainability, and combat climate change. Azizbek Abduhakimov actively promotes initiatives aimed at developing a 'green' economy, rational use of natural resources, and raising environmental awareness in the country.

publications_quote: “Our main goal is for Uzbekistan to become a reliable and long-term partner for foreign investors.”
В целях создания экосистемы по безопасно: In order to create an ecosystem for the safe development and popularization of esports in the republic, to identify, select, and select (select) talented young people by holding competitions and tournaments on a systematic basis, as well as to direct them to professional esports, to further expand the work on training and attracting potential personnel for information technologies and the IT industry
В рамках проведенных 2-3 мая 2024 года I: Within the framework of the III Tashkent International Investment Forum and the second plenary session of the Foreign Investors Council held on May 2-3, 2024, more than 2,500 foreign participants from 93 countries participated, agreements were reached on intergovernmental and interagency documents, the implementation of investment projects worth over US$26 billion, and proposals and initiatives were developed to strengthen the investment climate in the republic.
В целях обеспечения реализации предложен: In order to ensure the implementation of the proposals and initiatives put forward within the framework of the third plenary session of the Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan held on June 11, 2025, I decree:
Диалог государства и инвесторов, где обс: A dialogue between the state and investors, where reforms are discussed, key decisions are made, and the investment future of Uzbekistan is created.
По решениями совета: By the decision of the Council

Председатель правления TBC Bank Uzbekist: Chairman of the Board of TBC Bank Uzbekistan
Ipoteka Bank OTP Group, Директор дирекци: Ipoteka Bank OTP Group, Director of Marketing and Communications
Председатель Фонда развития культуры и и: Chairman of the Fund for the Development of Culture and Art of Uzbekistan under the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Председатель правления TBC Bank Uzbekist: Chairman of the Board of TBC Bank Uzbekistan, who took office in December 2020. In Uzbekistan, Tetrashvili has a non-trivial and ambitious task: to establish the operation of TBC Bank Uzbekistan, the first fully digital bank in Uzbekistan, which opened several months ago and has no process behind which a person stands, and all services can be obtained through the application - just like in payment systems. Spartak believes that the TBC brand's philosophy is to create transparent, accessible, and bold solutions. This also determines the work style of managers and each employee. "I've been with TBC for 7 years. If we talk about work style, we are one team at TBC. We work without formalism and division by official categories. Each team member can take the initiative and approach with a question, idea, or suggestion, and I am ready to listen to everyone's opinion. Not putting up barriers - that's what's important," Tetrashvili says.
Александр Рукавишников — директор Дирекц: Alexander Rukavishnikov is the Director of Marketing and Communications at Ipoteka Bank OTP Group. He doesn't just invent slogans - he builds bridges of trust between the bank and its million-strong audience. It operates at a high speed - Ipoteka Bank ranks 5th among Uzbekistan's banks with 7.6% of the mortgage market. Under his leadership, the bank's assets are growing by 20% annually in the loan portfolio, and deposits are growing by 24% in the portfolio. Year after year. The bank serves 1.5 million retail and a number of large corporate clients through 40 branches and 123 service points - and he knows this because he manages marketing there.
Сергей Саликов - Uzum, Главный юрисконсу: Sergey Salikov - Uzum, Chief Legal Counsel. He has over 12 years of experience in supporting investment agreements and establishing funds and holdings in various jurisdictions. He headed the legal block at the Russian Direct Investment Fund and was among those who supported M&A projects at Gazprombank.
Председатель Фонда развития культуры и и: Chairman of the Fund for the Development of Culture and Art of Uzbekistan under the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Secretary General of the National Commission of Uzbekistan for UNESCO Affairs under the Cabinet of Ministers. In 2004, she graduated from the School of Integrated Arts (West Yorkshire), in 2008 from Westminster International University with a degree in Business Administration, and in 2009 from Central Saint Martins College of Arts, (London, Great Britain), with a degree in Culture, Criticism, and Curatorship. He holds a master's degree in "Modern Art" and "Art Business" from the University of Manchester, (Manchester, UK, 2012) and the Art Institute at the Sotheby's auction house, (London, UK, 2011). Since 2017, she has been a research fellow at the Department of Political Studies and International Relations at the University of Oxford (Great Britain) in the field of "Cultural Diplomacy, Foreign Cultural Policy."
У Ерлана более 25 лет опыта работы в обл: Yerlan has over 25 years of experience in local and international taxation, tax efficiency, tax disputes, and tax risk management. Yerlan actively participates in projects to improve the business climate and investment attractiveness, oversees projects for the development of the institutional environment, infrastructure, decarbonization, and clean technologies. He was awarded the state award - the Order of "Kurmet" for his contribution to the economic development and improvement of the investment climate in Kazakhstan, and was also awarded medals for the 25th anniversary of the Constitution and the 30th anniversary of the Independence of Kazakhstan. Yerlan is the Chairman of the Board of the Association "Kazakhstan Council of Foreign Investors" and the European Business Association in Kazakhstan, the Co-Chairman of the Working Group on Implementing the Investment Policy of the Council of Foreign Investors, a member of the Council for Improving the Investment Climate under the Chairman of the Prime Minister of the American Chamber of Commerce (AmCham).
Джон Заиди обладает более чем 25-летним: John Zaidi has over 25 years of experience in taxation, energy development, and investment infrastructure. He actively participates in promoting energy projects, introducing new technologies, and strengthening Uzbekistan's energy sector. He is a member of the Association of the Council of Foreign Investors of Kazakhstan and represents ACWA in the European Energy Companies Association. Previously, he worked in leading international energy corporations, including projects in the USA and Europe.

Министр энергетики Республики Узбекистан: The Minister of Energy of the Republic of Uzbekistan, Jurabek Tursunpulatovich Mirzamahmudov, has headed the Ministry of Energy since 2022 and is responsible for the strategic development of the industry, the introduction of innovations, and the implementation of large investment projects in the energy sector. He has significant experience in atomic, renewable, and traditional energy, contributing to international cooperation and the integration of modern technologies for the sustainable growth of the country's economy. Under his leadership, Uzbekistan's energy complex focuses on investments, transitioning to "green" energy, and improving infrastructure efficiency.

Фаррух Жахонгирович Пулатов с марта 2022: Farrukh Jahongirovich Pulatov has been working as the Director of the Cadastre Agency under the State Tax Committee of the Republic of Uzbekistan since March 2022. He has higher education in engineering and jurisprudence, and has extensive management experience: he previously headed the "Uzdonmahsulot" company and held leadership positions in the prosecutor's office system. Under his leadership, the agency is implementing reforms to digitalize land and property accounting, as well as introducing modern services to increase transparency and efficiency of cadastral operations.

He has extensive experience in real estate, construction, corporate law, and judicial representation. Ahmadjonov actively participates in reforming the legal system of Uzbekistan, in particular, in regulating the legal profession and attracting foreign investment. As Deputy Chairman of the Working Group, he makes a significant contribution to the legal support and modernization of the regulatory framework for the development of the business and investment climate in the region.

Under the leadership of Mr. Dan Franklin Templeton, he is actively working on attracting international investors, preparing UzNIF for listing on the Tashkent and international stock exchanges, and supporting economic reforms and developing the investment climate in Uzbekistan. Marius Dan has over 17 years of experience in the asset management industry and plays a key role in improving the transparency and efficiency of the investment climate in the region.

Олимжон Умаров - заместитель министра ци: Olimjon Umarov is the Deputy Minister of Digital Technologies. He has many years of experience in information policy, mass communications, and digital development. Over the years, he has held responsible positions in public administration and in the information and communications sphere. Under his leadership, initiatives are being advanced to increase the openness and transparency of state bodies, establish effective dialogue with the public, and widely introduce modern information technologies. Olimjon Umarov is actively contributing to accelerating digital transformation processes in the country, improving the efficiency of public administration, and strengthening information policy.
Ерлан Беркинович Досимбеков - управляющи: Yerlan Berkinovich Dosimbekov is the EY Managing Partner for the Caucasus and Central Asia, with more than 25 years of experience in taxation, tax efficiency, and risk management. He actively participates in initiatives aimed at improving the business environment, developing the institutional framework, and advancing projects in decarbonization and clean technologies. Yerlan is the Chairman of the Board of the Association "Council of Foreign Investors of Kazakhstan" and a member of several key business councils, including the Council for Improving the Investment Climate under the Prime Minister of Kazakhstan. He regularly speaks at international forums and provides advisory services to EY clients in Central Asia and the Caucasus. His professional leadership and contribution support the development of the region and the strengthening of a sustainable economy.

Системное совершенствование инвестиционн: Systematic improvement of the investment climate: removing administrative barriers and enhancing the transparency and predictability of regulation.

Пятая промежуточная сессия Совета прошла: The fifth interim session of the Council was chaired by the Minister of Investment, Industry and Trade L. Kudratov. Protocol No. 1 was approved on 23 January 2026. At the session, the interagency working groups presented their results, and Council members put forward a number of strategic initiatives.
Региональный альянс инвестиционных совет: Regional Alliance of Investment Councils of Central Asia and the Caucasus (RAIC-CAC) — harmonisation of investment-climate approaches and cross-border coordination. Curator — Asian Development Bank. Official launch — at the V TIIF.
Рабочая группа «Циркулярная экономика» —: “Circular Economy” working group — analysis and adaptation of leading international practices; establishment of the FIC “Circular Economy” award. Curator — Coca-Cola.
Рабочая группа «Акселератор креативных и: “Creative Industries Accelerator” working group — transforming creative sectors into investment- and export-oriented industries within five years. Curator — Foundation for the Development of Culture and Art.
Рабочая группа по искусственному интелле: Artificial Intelligence working group — study and adaptation of global AI practices. Curator — EY.
Национальная открытая платформа «Навыки: “Skills of the Future” national open platform — development of ten key competencies. Curators — Yandex, OTP Group.

Ответственное ведение бизнеса (Crowe) —: Responsible business conduct (Crowe) — draft decree on the phased adoption of RBC standards.
Альтернативные инвестиционные фонды (Vis: Alternative investment funds (Vision Invest) — turning Uzbekistan into a regional hub for private and venture capital.
Энергетика (ACWA Power, EDF, China Energ: Energy (ACWA Power, EDF, China Energy) — private investment in electricity distribution; grid development plan; stability of the legal and tax regime.
Выделение земель (Kosta Legal) — упрощен: Land allocation (Kosta Legal) — simplification and acceleration of procedures, draft Strategy for the use of land resources.
Подготовка кадров (OTP Group, Яндекс) —: Workforce development (OTP Group, Yandex) — national internship portal; open educational platform; Fund for mandatory technical internships.
Залоговое законодательство (BDO, EY, Uzu: Collateral legislation (BDO, EY, Uzum, TBC) — new types of collateral; Islamic finance (Green Sukuk, Takaful); securitisation; secure data exchange.
Первая сессия после учреждения Совета: First session after the Council was established
Протокол № 1 (утв. 23.01.2026). Дорожная: Protocol No. 1 (approved 23.01.2026). Roadmap — 21 initiatives across 8 working groups; new groups established (circular economy, AI, creative industries accelerator) and the RAIC-CAC alliance
VI промежуточная сессия Совета: VI interim session of the Council
18 мая Совет иностранных инвесторов при: On 18 May, the Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan held an Interim Session with the Deputy Prime Minister of the Republic of Uzbekistan, H.E. Mr. Jamshid Khodjaev, dedicated to the review of initiatives advanced by our membership ahead of the IV Plenary.
Тематические блоки охватили приоритеты,: Thematic blocks covered the priorities our members have identified as decisive for the next phase of the country's investment climate — from regulatory and administrative reform to sectoral and cross-border agendas.
Каждый блок открывался предложениями рук: Each block opened with proposals from working group leads, followed by direct response from the government side and open exchange with the room.
Итог: инициативы получили поддержку Прав: The outcome: the initiatives received the Government's support across the board, with implementation pathways to be reflected in the Plenary's deliverables.
Именно для этого и создавался СИИ — Сове: This is the model the FIC was built for — a Council where investor priorities are heard at the highest level and converted into commitments that move.
Совет переходит к подготовке Четвёртого: The Council now turns to the Fourth Plenary Session on 18 June 2026 in Tashkent, to be chaired by H.E. President Shavkat Mirziyoyev and co-chaired by EBRD President Ms. Odile Renaud-Basso.
С благодарностью Заместителю Премьер-мин: With gratitude to Deputy Prime Minister Khodjaev, to Mr. Andi Aranitasi (EBRD Head of Uzbekistan) for moderating, and to the FIC members whose preparation made the day count.

Международные финансовые организации, ак: International financial institutions active in Uzbekistan with whom Asar Advisory has established working relationships.
С 2016 года мы наблюдали, как Узбекистан: Since 2016, we have watched Uzbekistan transform from a largely closed economy into one of Eurasia's most dynamic investment destinations. The reform programme that began in 2017 has reshaped the legal framework, opened capital markets, and established Uzbekistan as a genuine priority for international capital.
2025 год стал явной точкой перелома. Fit: 2025 marks a clear inflection point. Both Fitch and S&P upgraded Uzbekistan's sovereign rating to BB — the first upgrade since 2018 — signalling to institutional investors that the macro fundamentals are structurally improving. The IMF confirmed GDP growth exceeded 7% in the first three quarters of 2025. The World Bank places Uzbekistan among the three fastest-growing developing economies in the Europe and Central Asia region for 2026. WTO accession, targeted for early 2026, will be the single largest structural opening of the economy since the 2017 currency liberalisation.
Чего не отражают данные: неформальные зн: What the data does not capture: the informal knowledge that determines whether a project succeeds — relationships, timing, the right framing with the right official, understanding when to push and when to wait.
Эти знания приходят только от присутстви: That knowledge comes only from being here.
Комплексная правовая реформа с 2017 года: Comprehensive legal reform since 2017 — investment code, PPP law, tax code overhaul
Приоритетные секторы: возобновляемая эне: Priority sectors: renewable energy, agribusiness, manufacturing, IT, logistics, tourism
Твёрдая государственная приверженность п: Strong government commitment to attracting international capital and expertise
Стратегические ворота: граничит с Китаем: Strategic gateway: borders China, Afghanistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan
Повышение суверенного рейтинга: Fitch и: Sovereign credit upgrade: Fitch & S&P raised to BB in 2025 — first upgrade since 2018. Moody's outlook revised to positive
Всемирный банк: Узбекистан входит в трой: World Bank: Uzbekistan ranked among the 3 fastest-growing developing economies in Europe & Central Asia in 2026. GDP growth forecast 6%+ through 2027
Вступление в ВТО намечено на 2026 год —: WTO accession targeted 2026 — final stages of negotiations. Will deepen market access, standardise trade rules and further open the economy to international capital
* Foreign investments (2025): invest.gov.uz / MIIT. Includes FDI, loans and project financing. GDP (2025): IMF. Growth (2025): IMF staff visit, Nov 2025. 2026 projection: World Bank.

Совет иностранных инвесторов при Президе: The Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan is an institutional platform for direct dialogue between the Government of Uzbekistan and investors operating in the country. It was established by Presidential Resolution No. PP-4519 dated November 13, 2019.
Деятельность Совета направлена на выявле: The Council’s activities are aimed at identifying key obstacles to attracting investment, developing solutions jointly with government bodies to eliminate them, and ensuring a favorable investment climate. The Chair of the Council is the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan; the Co-Chair is the President of the EBRD.
Учреждение Совета (ПП-4519). Первая пром: Establishment of the Council (PP-4519). First interim session — November 20
II Пленарная сессия — 3 мая, в рамках II: II Plenary Session — May 3, within the III Tashkent International Investment Forum. PP-179 — creation of four working groups
III Пленарная сессия — 11 июня. ПП-226 —: III Plenary Session — June 11. PP-226 — expansion of the working groups
Регистрация Ассоциации — 4 ноября. Проме: Registration of the Association — November 4. Interim session — November 19
IV Пленарная сессия — 18 июня, в рамках: IV Plenary Session — June 18, within the V Tashkent International Investment Forum
Совет иностранных инвесторов при Президе: The Foreign Investors Council under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan was established by Presidential Resolution No. PP-4519 dated November 13, 2019 as a consultative and advisory body for direct dialogue between foreign investors, international financial institutions and the Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
По мере расширения деятельности Совета в: As the Council’s activities expanded, the need arose for a permanently functioning operational body. By Presidential Resolution No. PP-226 dated July 18, 2025, the proposal of the Council members and international financial institutions to establish the Secretariat of the Council in the form of a non-governmental non-profit organization was supported.
Во исполнение данного постановления 4 но: In execution of this resolution, on November 4, 2025, the Association of Legal Entities (Association, Union) “Foreign Investors Council”, TIN 312 551 219, was registered — a legal entity performing the functions of the Secretariat of the Council.
организация пленарных и промежуточных се: organization of plenary and interim sessions
координация деятельности 16 рабочих груп: coordination of the activities of 16 working groups
Общее собрание учредителей — высший орга: General Meeting of Founders — the supreme body
Глава Ассоциации / Руководитель Секретар: Head of the Association / Head of the Secretariat
Членами Совета иностранных инвесторов яв: The members of the Foreign Investors Council are leading international companies, banks and financial institutions making strategic investments in the economy of Uzbekistan. Membership reflects a long-term commitment to the country’s development and provides a direct channel of dialogue with the Government on investment policy matters. The Council brings together 43 members from 19 countries, representing 23 sectors of the economy.
Деятельность Совета строится на модели с: The Council operates on a model of joint chairmanship that reflects the partnership-based nature of the dialogue between the state and international investors. The Council is chaired by the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan; the Co-Chair is the President of the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development. Operational management is carried out by the Executive Committee, which comprises representatives of the three founding international financial institutions — the EBRD, the ADB and the IFC — alongside the relevant minister and the Head of the Association.
Секретариат Совета иностранных инвесторо: The Secretariat of the Foreign Investors Council is a permanently functioning operational body that ensures the continuity and consistency of the Council’s work between sessions. The Secretariat organizes plenary and interim meetings, coordinates the activities of the sixteen working groups, maintains a daily dialogue with Council members and foreign investors, collects and analyzes initiatives to improve the investment climate, and ensures their advancement into the relevant state policy.
С обретением статуса юридического лица С: With the acquisition of legal entity status, the Secretariat gained the institutional autonomy necessary to effectively fulfil its mandate and to engage with international financial institutions.
Эксперты Совета — признанные международн: The Council’s experts are recognized international and local specialists who provide expert support to the working groups and initiatives of the Foreign Investors Council. The Council highly values their contribution to the development of Uzbekistan’s investment policy and recognizes their professional competence.

The Council’s experts are recognized international and local specialists who provide professional support to the working groups and initiatives of the Council: law, finance, taxation, energy, digital technologies, and sustainable development.
Представители ведущих консалтинговых, юр: Representatives of leading consulting, legal and financial organizations involved in developing legislative initiatives and adapting international standards.
Национальные специалисты в области инвес: National specialists in the field of investment policy, corporate governance and sectoral regulation, linking international practice with the conditions of Uzbekistan.
За отчётный период Совет иностранных инв: Over the reporting period, the Foreign Investors Council significantly strengthened its role as a key platform for interaction between the state and foreign investors and as an instrument for the development of Uzbekistan’s investment policy.
Восемь НПА, разработанных при участии Со: Eight legal acts developed with the Council’s participation
международных института (3 в Исполкоме): international institutions (3 on the Executive Committee)

Председатель Совета — Президент Республи: Chairman of the Council — President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Сопредседатель Совета — Президент ЕБРР: Co-Chairman of the Council — President of the EBRD
Министр инвестиций, промышленности и тор: Minister of Investments, Industry and Trade of the Republic of Uzbekistan, Chairman of the Executive Committee. Leads the country's investment policy, industrial development and foreign trade.
Глава Ассоциации и Руководитель Секретар: Head of the Association and Head of the Council Secretariat. A top manager with over 20 years of experience in corporate governance, risk management and investment policy.
Директор, Глава представительства ЕБРР в: Director, Head of the EBRD Representative Office in Uzbekistan. Over 25 years of experience in banking; expanded EBRD investments in energy, infrastructure and the private sector of Uzbekistan.
Страновой директор АБР в Узбекистане. Бо: ADB Country Director for Uzbekistan. Over 25 years of experience in development and economic policy.
Директор офиса МФК по Узбекистану и Турк: Director of the IFC office for Uzbekistan and Turkmenistan. Leads IFC operations for private sector development.
Единый источник официальных документов С: A single source of the Council's official documents: annual reports, meeting minutes, presidential decrees and founding materials.
Аналитические доклады и материалы по лид: Analytical reports and thought-leadership materials are available in the «Publications» section.

От открытия экономики к рынку капитала: From opening the economy to a capital market
С 2017 года Узбекистан осуществил одну и: Since 2017, Uzbekistan has carried out one of the largest economic transformations in Eurasia. Liberalisation of the currency market, tax and judicial reforms, the opening of capital markets and privatisation have turned a once-closed economy into one of the most dynamic investment destinations in the region. Today it is Central Asia’s largest market by population — around 37.7 million people — with steadily growing domestic demand.
2025 год подтвердил эту траекторию. Рост: 2025 confirmed this trajectory. GDP growth reached 7.7% — above most forecasts; inflation fell to 7.3% and unemployment to 4.8%. Fitch raised the sovereign rating to BB for the first time in seven years, S&P affirmed BB, and Moody’s kept Ba3 while upgrading the outlook to ‘positive’. Accession to the World Trade Organization is being completed — the largest structural opening of the economy since the currency liberalisation of 2017
рейтинг Fitch и S&P; Moody's Ba3 (прогно: Fitch and S&P rating; Moody’s Ba3 (positive outlook)
Закон «Об инвестициях и инвестиционной д: The Law ‘On Investments and Investment Activity’ guarantees the free transfer of funds abroad and protection of investments against nationalisation.
Базовые ставки налогов для бизнеса не из: Basic tax rates for business will not change until 2028.
Совет иностранных инвесторов при Президе: The Foreign Investors Council under the President is an institutional channel for resolving investors’ issues at the highest level.
Ташкентский международный арбитражный це: Tashkent International Arbitration Centre; Tashkent International Commercial Court.
Безвизовый въезд для членов Совета и чле: Visa-free entry for Council members and their families.
ACWA Power, Masdar, TotalEnergies, EDF,: ACWA Power, Masdar, TotalEnergies, EDF, Voltalia
DataVolt — крупнейший «зелёный» дата-цен: DataVolt — the region’s largest ‘green’ data centre
Либерализация валютного рынка, старт сис: Liberalisation of the currency market, the start of systemic reforms; GDP around $56 bn.
Учреждение Совета иностранных инвесторов: Establishment of the Foreign Investors Council under the President — an institutional platform for dialogue with investors.
Энергетические реформы; рекордные вложен: Energy reforms; record investments by international companies in the green economy.
Повышение рейтингов Fitch и S&P до BB; п: Fitch and S&P ratings raised to BB; foreign investment inflow ~$42 bn; GDP growth 7.7%.
Завершение вступления в ВТО; создание Та: Completion of WTO accession; creation of the Tashkent International Financial Centre; target — GDP above $150 bn. Over nine years, around $125 bn in foreign investment was attracted, against ~$4.5 bn in 2017.

invest.since_2017: Since 2017, Uzbekistan has undergone one of the most significant economic transformations in Eurasia. Liberalization of the foreign exchange market, tax and judicial reforms, capital market development, and privatization have transformed a previously closed economy into one of the region's most dynamic investment destinations. Today, it is the largest market in Central Asia by population, with approximately 37.7 million people and steadily growing domestic demand.
invest.sources: IMF (Article IV, 2026), World Bank, EBRD; Fitch, S&P, Moody's; Presidential address on the 2025 results; invest.gov.uz / MIFT; PwC Investor Guide.
invest.alt_funds_desc: Alternative investment funds. Development of legislation on alternative (venture) investments and transforming Uzbekistan into a regional hub for private and venture capital attraction.
invest.body_before_1: 120 initiatives were developed. The thematic blocks covered priorities identified by Council members as key for the next stage of investment climate development — from regulatory and administrative reform to sectoral and cross-border issues.
invest.body_before_2: Each block opened with proposals from working group leaders, followed by responses from the government side and open discussion with participants.
invest.year_2025: 2025 reaffirmed this trajectory. GDP growth reached 7.7%, exceeding most forecasts; inflation declined to 7.3%, while unemployment fell to 4.8%. Fitch upgraded the sovereign rating to BB for the first time in seven years, S&P reaffirmed its BB rating, and Moody's maintained Ba3 while improving the outlook to positive. The country's accession process to the World Trade Organization is nearing completion, marking the most significant structural opening of the economy since the currency liberalization reforms of 2017.
